name: Ayam Gereng (Indonesian Fried Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken thighs, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chicken pieces with eggs and set aside.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and baking soda.
3. Dip each piece of chicken in the egg mixture, then coat it with the flour mixture.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
5. Once the oil is hot, add the coated chicken pieces in batches, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
6. Cook until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Remove from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess fat.
8. Set aside and serve hot with rice or noodles.
